hero.headline: One platform. Every module of your operation.
hero.subheadline: SRM, CRM, CLM, Procurement and Risk Management running on the same data, permissions and visual identity — no fragile integrations between disconnected systems.

bento.auditBody: Every sensitive event logged — who, when, tenant, action.

dashboardPage.subtitle: Here's a quick overview of your workspace.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: You'll be the first admin — invite your team afterwards.
onboarding.taxIdHint: Used to detect if your company is already on BusinessHub.
onboarding.consentLabel: I have read and accept BusinessHub's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
onboarding.consentLabelAdmin: I understand I'll be the administrator of this organization — I'll be able to approve new members, and this role can't be revoked by anyone on my team, only by the BusinessHub platform. I have read and accept the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
onboarding.consentRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.
onboarding.slugHint: This will be your team's own address on BusinessHub.
onboarding.slugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
onboarding.slugTaken: That address is already taken — try another.
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.provisioningBody: This can take up to three minutes the first time. You'll be redirected automatically.
onboarding.provisioningErrorTitle: This is taking longer than expected
onboarding.provisioningErrorBody: We couldn't automatically confirm it finished. Try the link below — if it's not ready yet, wait a bit and try again.
onboarding.pendingBody: Your company is already on BusinessHub. We notified the admins — you'll get access once someone approves your request.

companyLogo.title: Company logo
companyLogo.hint: PNG or JPG, up to 1000x1000px and 5MB.
companyLogo.errorGeneric: Couldn't upload the image. Please try again.

adminPage.title: Administration
adminPage.subtitle: People waiting for access to your organization.
adminPage.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Your personal account information.
profilePage.emailHint: Contact an admin to change your email.
profilePage.avatarError: Couldn't upload the image. Try a smaller file (up to 2MB).

login.title: Log in to BusinessHub
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in — check the link we sent to your inbox.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Set up access to your organization's workspace.
signup.successBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.placeholder: This content will be published soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: This content will be published soon.
